而且这书太特么搞笑了，强烈建议各大书友入坑。主要也很甜 ，目前看来无毒无刀，非常好看，作者大大快更新。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1705494569,"group_id":"7295765058615774243","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"星河不再璀璨，人间再无理想.","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyViV9IDFoV6881+7kFPMAdFSfQU3L/kXTxy+EK0wh09","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/d4570effbff14d7bb2ffb4ba327ef807~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776534249&x-signature=sKvAH4c5sqEPWBGphqpZwr2TORA%3D","user_id":"2184053415223336","user_name":"风萧萧兮易水墨寒"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2184053415223336","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1743094044,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7295765058615774243","book_info":{"abstract":"［都市日常］〔大学半真实生活体验〕（偏日常+1V1+无系统+学姐+校园恋爱）（女主十章内出现）

　　“儿子，你爸其实是龙国首富！”
　　老妈的一句话直接给林寻干懵了。
　　在工地搬砖的老爸成了龙国首富？
　　在某个饭店洗碗的老妈居然是贵族名媛？
　　突如其来的真相，让林寻的生活发生了翻天覆地的变化，他不仅成了人人羡慕的富二代，还考上了知名高校南大。
　　更重要的是，他认识了如同仙女般的高冷学姐，学姐对别人冷若冰霜，对自己却是温柔似水！
　　林霸天：“儿子，你赶紧把儿媳妇娶回来，继承家产。”
　　顾颜颜：“宝贝儿子，这个儿媳妇我认了，你看着办。”
　　苏清诗：“学弟，余生，请多指教。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/f9fecf1492282506bc6f28d8796f9c5d","author":"我不下人间","author_id":"","book_id":"7295765058615774243","book_name":"大学恋爱后，学姐高冷人设崩塌了","book_short_name":"学姐，余生好","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#c8c0c8","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5.9万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":20,"name":"神豪","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=20&name=神豪&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":385,"name":"校花","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=385&name=校花&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":389,"name":"单女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=389&name=单女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":834,"name":"1v1","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=834&name=1v1&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":838,"name":"无后宫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=838&name=无后宫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7295765266837799439","read_count":"58404","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1454701"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.4","serial_count":"711","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,神豪,校花,单女主,1v1,无后宫","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/7a3755d898b918c53d3b77684c2f6b23~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779184869&x-signature=eTnY5bkWwn4tv%2BRoiJdb5M%2Fiwho%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3046115927145996","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"55"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201801095BA6B844D4CE7D47E2EB"}"},"relate_info_
